turns.speaker: founder
turns.text: Our product normalizes lab results across clinics.

turns.speaker: founder
turns.text: We ran a pilot with three clinics last quarter.

turns.speaker: founder
turns.text: The market opportunity is very large.

turns.speaker: founder
turns.text: Integration timelines remain our main risk. Switching costs are high once wired in.

turns.speaker: founder
turns.text: Our team has shipped milestone one on schedule.

turns.speaker: founder
turns.text: We have a defensible moat from network effects.
